title: Unitree G1 Robot Motion Control Guide
excerpt: Control the G1 humanoid's movements using the Unitree SDK — joint indices, low-level commands, and building custom motions like the classic dab.
author: Samantha Belano

title: G1 Remote Development Setup (VS Code & SSH)
excerpt: Set up VS Code with Remote-SSH to write, edit, and debug code directly on the Unitree G1 without a laggy remote desktop.
author: Lab Team

title: G1 Remote Desktop Setup (NoMachine)
excerpt: Connect to the G1's onboard desktop over Ethernet using NoMachine — network configuration, static IP setup, and first login.
author: Lab Team

title: G1 Pose Builder
excerpt: An interactive CLI tool for manually posing the G1's arms and waist, saving poses to a library, and playing them back via the arm_sdk interface.
author: Lab Team

title: Understanding G1 Joint Movements: Roll, Pitch, and Yaw
excerpt: What roll, pitch, and yaw mean for the G1's joints — axis of rotation explained with practical examples for each joint type.
author: Lab Team

title: Getting Started with ROS 2 (Robot Operating System)
excerpt: A beginner's guide to nodes, topics, services, and building your first ROS workspace. Learn how modern robotic software modules communicate.
author: Dr. Sarah Miller

title: Robot Kinematics: Forward & Inverse Solutions
excerpt: Dive into the mathematical foundation of robotic arm movements. Understand Denavit-Hartenberg (DH) parameters and coordinate transformations.
author: Marcus Thorne, PhD Candidate

title: Computer Vision in Robotics: Object Tracking
excerpt: How to guide a robot arm using a camera feed. We build an end-to-end HSV color tracker and connect coordinate spaces using OpenCV.
author: Elena Rostova
